allow: Bash(find src/views -name "*.vue" -exec sed -i 's/bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-6/bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-lg shadow p-6/g' {} +)
Bash(sed -i 's/text-sm font-medium text-gray-700/text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300/g' src/components/FieldRenderer.vue)
Bash(sed -i 's/text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700/text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300/g' src/components/FieldRenderer.vue)

Bash(sed -i "s/border rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-primary-500 focus:border-primary-500/border rounded-md shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-primary-500 focus:border-primary-500 dark:bg-gray-700 dark:border-gray-600 dark:text-gray-100/g" src/components/FieldRenderer.vue)
